title: hetaeria elata
intro: Hetaeria elata, also known as the tall hetaeria or Hetaeria elata, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hetaeria elata include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as supporting immune function and reducing inflammation. Hetaeria elata is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction for use in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
